17.reason: [Using `gets()` is unsafe and may cause buffer overflow; however, the main logic error is elsewhere.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Using `gets()` is unsafe and may cause buffer overflow; however, the main logic error is elsewhere.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Using `gets()` is unsafe and may cause buffer overflow; more critically, it reads the entire line including the '=', but the parsing logic does not account for the '=' as a terminator properly. The loop processes every non-digit as an operator, so '=' will be treated as an operator, leading to invalid memory access later.]
